query:
SELECT 
  ci.name,
  COUNT(*) as total_matches,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cpm.matchScore < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as below_60,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cpm.matchScore >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as at_or_above_60
FROM collateralProjectMatches cpm
JOIN collateralItems ci ON ci.id = cpm.collateralId
GROUP BY ci.name;

  COUNT(*) as total_matches,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cpm.matchScore < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as below_60,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cpm.matchScore >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as at_or_above_60
FROM collateralProjectMatches cpm
JOIN collateralItems ci ON ci.id = cpm.collateralId
GROUP BY ci.name;
